message:
fix(a11y): use HighContrast theme for high_contrast mode tests

Fix theme mismatch in a11y_snapshots.rs: tests were using ThemeId::Darcula
for high_contrast mode but app.rs uses ThemeId::HighContrast in
apply_a11y_settings(). Changed all occurrences to use HighContrast for
consistency with app behavior.

All 65 a11y tests pass with updated snapshots.

Based on fix by CopperDeer.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -7,4 +7,4 @@
 │╰───────────╯                         │
 │t:theme q:quit                        │
 ╰──────────────────────────────────────╯
- Dashboard [1/28]  Darcula A11y:HC RM LT
\ No newline at end of file
+ Dashboard [1/28]  High Contrast A11y:HC
\ No newline at end of file

@@ -7,4 +7,4 @@
 │╰───────────╯                         │
 │t:theme q:quit                        │
 ╰──────────────────────────────────────╯
- Dashboard [1/28]  Darcula A11y:HC40x10 
\ No newline at end of file
+ Dashboard [1/28]  High Contrast A11y:HC
\ No newline at end of file
